defaultSafePolicy.alias: resolve alias target while preserving alias mode notes
defaultSafePolicy.future_effective: select by effective dates, never by array order
defaultSafePolicy.null_price: do not calculate; show unavailable/review message
defaultSafePolicy.redirect_billing: show original slug as retired/redirected and calculate against billingModelInternalId only with explicit label
defaultSafePolicy.review_required: display only with warning; no default or recommendation placement
defaultSafePolicy.unsafe: exclude from default calculations and show warning only where explicitly allowed

integrationModes.reason: adds request-time external dependency, latency, stale/failure ambiguity, and rollback complexity
better latency than runtime fetch but build reproducibility depends on external availability
deterministic, reviewable, rollback-friendly, and no production runtime dependency on GitHub Pages
good automation after projection contract and rollback policy are approved

specialPolicies.claude-sonnet-5: Use effective-date selection: intro through 2026-08-31, standard from 2026-09-01.
specialPolicies.cohere/command-a-plus: excluded from default until official token pricing is complete.
specialPolicies.gpt-4.1_family: review_required and defaultSafe=false; may remain SEO/historical display with warning.
specialPolicies.openai/gpt-5: excluded from default until current API pricing is officially confirmed.
specialPolicies.openai/o3: excluded from default until current API pricing is officially confirmed.
specialPolicies.xai/grok-3: Do not display as active; if current cost is offered, label redirected billing to xai/grok-4.3.
